description_long: This bungalow features a rustic log cabin aesthetic with natural wood siding and a dark, gabled roof. The structure sits on a stone foundation, with a small front porch accessible by a set of steps. Large windows, including a prominent bay window, provide ample natural light and visual interest to the facade. The roofline is complex, with intersecting gables and overhangs that add architectural depth. The landscaping consists of a simple grassy plot, and the building appears to be a single-story dwelling. The overall design suggests a cozy, residential home suitable for suburban or semi-rural neighborhoods.
description: A single-story log bungalow with a dark gabled roof, stone foundation, front porch, and large bay window, set on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, and steps leading up to the door.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the prominent bay window and the intersection of roof gables.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the extended roof overhang and additional windows along the side wall.
description_view_3: Rear view with a simpler facade, fewer windows, and the back of the roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with bay window on front facade
